feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Rain, falling as snow down to 1000 metres. Expect a small amount (less than 1 cm) to accumulate on the road about the summit at times.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Snow flurries possible above 900 metres with less than 1 cm settling about the summit.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Snow showers above about 800 metres. A further 1 to 3 cm may accumulate about the summit.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain, with peak rain rates of 15 to 25 mm/hr possible this evening and overnight. Rainfall amounts may approach warning criteria, mainly about the ranges. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Warning - Orange
entry.summary: Expect 40 to 60 mm of rain to accumulate about the ranges and coastal hills, and lesser amounts elsewhere. This is in addition to the rain that has already fallen. Peak rates of 15 to 25 mm/h until tonight. Impact: Streams and rivers may rise rapidly. Surface flooding, slips, and difficult driving conditions possible. Chance of upgrading to a Red Warning: Minimal.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Strong Wind Watch
entry.summary: South to southeast winds may approach severe gale in exposed places. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Low. Changes: Watch period extended.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
